roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOTION TO REMOVE GPS & REDUCE 17(B) PER PLEA AGREEMENT FILED

/CAL:REMOVE GPS & 17(B)PC/X:BRUCE CALDERON, CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, REPRESENTING THE DEFENDANT UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF PD/ /X:PART OF THE NEGOTIATEDPLEA WAS THAT AFTER A YEAR, FELONY CHARGE WOULD BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR/MISDRED1:3/EMTERM/X:NO FUTURE DATES ARE INDICATED ON THIS CASE/COURT ORDERS THAT ELECTRONIC MONITORING (GPS) BY THE APD IS TERMINATED FORTHWITH,  THE DEFENDANT SHALL CHECK IN WITH APD STAFF AND RETURN ALL ISSUED EQUIPMENT/X:NO FUTURE DATES ARE INDICATED ON THIS CASE/

/CAL SENTENCE/AJW/CH3 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 6 M/CTS 44/IND/WS/WEAP/NALC/RX/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE HIS CUSTODY TIME ON HOME DETENTION ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH THE CPO FILED 10-16-20/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/RESTV/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/EMTERM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PROBATION MONITORING BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE APD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:11-16-20/PPRF//ARBUCKLE/SA1:MARCO RUSTRIAN/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-SENTENCING MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: THE PEOPLE FILED DETENTION MOTION/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/CTORD: THE MOTION TO DETAIN IS GRANTED/NB/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 11-12-20 (30TH)/SA1: MARCO RUSTRIAN/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:ALL WITNESSES & VICTIMS ARE ORDERED BACK/CONT/DOP/
